# OneShot — OpenCode Agent Instructions

<!-- Generated by OneShot. Edit docs/instructions/ instead. -->

This is the OpenCode projection of the OneShot operating contract.

## Instructions

See `AGENTS.md` at the repository root for the neutral operating contract.
See `docs/instructions/` for the authoritative instruction source.

## Routing

Read `config/lanes.yaml` and `config/models.yaml` for lane-based routing.
Task classes are defined in `docs/instructions/task-classes.md`.

## Available Models

Connect to OpenRouter: `/connect openrouter`
Then use `/models` to see available models.

## Key Commands

- `/conduct` — Multi-model orchestration
- `/research` — Search via Argus
- `/freesearch` — Quick search via Argus (cheap mode)
